$comment: Canonical list of all research segment document keys. Every entry should exist in `documents` for every baseline/delta date. On delta days where no update is warranted, the skill marks the entry `status: skipped` and the UI carries the last version forward automatically.

segments.name: Macro Analysis
segments.description: 4-factor macro regime (Growth/Inflation/Policy/Risk Appetite), key yields, geopolitical events

segments.name: US Equities
segments.description: SPY/QQQ breadth, index levels, factor performance, earnings pulse

segments.name: Bonds & Rates
segments.description: 2Y/10Y yield curve, HY spreads, Fed Funds futures, duration signals

segments.name: Commodities
segments.description: WTI, Brent, Gold, Copper, Natgas

segments.name: Forex
segments.description: DXY, EUR/USD, USD/JPY, USD/CNH, GBP/USD

segments.name: Crypto
segments.description: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, Fear & Greed, on-chain signals

segments.name: International
segments.description: Nikkei, DAX, Shanghai, Hang Seng, EM indices, DXY-linked cross-asset

segments.name: Technology (XLK)
segments.description: AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, META; AI capex; semiconductor cycle

segments.name: Financials (XLF)
segments.description: Bank earnings, net interest margin, credit quality, M&A

segments.name: Health Care (XLV)
segments.description: Drug approvals, Medicare/Medicaid policy, biotech catalyst watch

segments.name: Energy (XLE)
segments.description: Oil majors, refining margins, nat-gas storage, geopolitical supply

segments.name: Industrials (XLI)
segments.description: Capex cycle, defense, aerospace, tariff overhang

segments.name: Consumer Disc. (XLY)
segments.description: Retail sales, consumer confidence, AMZN/TSLA, travel

segments.name: Consumer Staples (XLP)
segments.description: Defensive rotation signal, private label vs branded, input costs

segments.name: Comm. Services (XLC)
segments.description: GOOGL, META, streaming, social, digital ad spend

segments.name: Real Estate (XLRE)
segments.description: REIT sub-sectors, mortgage rates, construction data

segments.name: Utilities (XLU)
segments.description: Yield-sensitivity, power grid, AI data-center load, natgas input

segments.name: Materials (XLB)
segments.description: Copper, lithium, gold miners, China demand linkage

segments.name: Institutional Flows
segments.description: ETF flows, 13D/13G filings, dark pool prints, mutual fund moves

segments.name: CTA Positioning
segments.description: Systematic trend-follower equity/bond/commodity exposure; trigger levels

segments.name: Options & Derivatives
segments.description: VIX term structure, put/call ratios, unusual OI, dealer gamma exposure

segments.name: Political Signals
segments.description: Congressional trades, executive orders, regulatory signals, tariff watch

segments.name: Hedge Fund Intel
segments.description: 13F quarterly updates, notable HF entry/exit signals, activist moves

segments.name: Sentiment
segments.description: Fear & Greed, AAII survey, Reddit/social positioning, news sentiment
